title: Tag
description: Tag schema from Censys Platform API

created_at.description: RFC3339 timestamp when the tag was created.

created_by.description: The user ID of the user who created the tag.

description.description: A human-readable description of the tag.

id.description: The unique ID of the tag.

name.description: The display name of the tag.

privacy.description: Tag visibility and management settings. `private` tags are only visible to and editable by organization admins. `shared` tags are visible to and editable by all organization members.

updated_at.description: RFC3339 timestamp when the tag was last updated.
